chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-454 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objection 2.For hearing of main case 04-12-2023 None present for the applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G. ***** None present for the applicant. No intimation is received so far; same was the position on the last date of hearing. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
